Web search results for query: "CSS masonry "grid-lanes" "display: grid-lanes" CSSWG resolution 2025 syntax"

Links: [{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS - MDN Web Docs","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"Introducing CSS Grid Lanes | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/17660/introducing-css-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"Brick by brick: Help us build CSS Masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-update"},{"title":"Help us choose the final syntax for Masonry in CSS | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/16026/css-masonry-syntax/"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes: The New Native Masonry Layout","url":"https://blog.openreplay.com/css-grid-lanes-masonry-layout/"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes","url":"https://247webdevs.blogspot.com/2025/12/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes.html"},{"title":"CSS Grid Layout Module Level 3","url":"https://www.w3.org/TR/css-grid-3/"},{"title":"CSS WG Blog – CSS Grid: Level 1 & 2 updated, Level 3 (masonry layout) reworked","url":"https://www.w3.org/blog/CSS/2025/03/28/css-grid-1-2-3-updated/"}]

Based on the search results, I found comprehensive information about CSS masonry and the "grid-lanes" syntax resolution:

## CSSWG Resolution and Syntax

On January 31st of 2025, a meeting was held and it was resolved to reuse grid templating and placement properties for masonry layout. The latest announcement is that setting grid-lanes on the display property activates a masonry layout.

## Official Syntax: `display: grid-lanes`

Level 3 of the CSS grid layout specification defines masonry layout (also known as grid-lanes layout), which is accessed via the display values grid-lanes and inline-grid-lanes.

## Basic Usage

To create the most common masonry layout where the columns are laid out in a grid, and the rows stack like masonry, use display: grid-lanes along with grid-template-columns. The child elements of this container will lay out item by item along the stacking axis according to the masonry algorithm.

Here's an example of the syntax:

```css
.grid {
  display: grid-lanes;
  gap: 10px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr));
}
```

## Key Design Decision

Deciding on the keyword alone took years, and there were many names that were considered leading up to grid-lanes. The resolution was to re-use grid templating and placement properties for masonry layout.
